channel.title: Cybersecurity News Aggregator
channel.description: Latest cybersecurity news from top sources
channel.comment: News aggregated from: Cointelegraph - Security, Threatpost, Bleeping Computer, Dark Reading, Blockthreat, CryptoPotato, CryptoSlate, Krebs On Security, The Hacker News, Coindesk, GroupIB Blog, Data Breach Today, CNN.com - Crypto News, DataBreaches.net

item.title: Bitcoin rebounds from key support as traders eye renewed push toward $80,000
item.description: BTC climbs after holding at the $75,600 support level while derivatives signal de-risking, and speculative flows build in memecoins ahead of tech earnings....
item.dc:creator: Coindesk

item.title: Established ‘Sell in May’ philosophy looks broken, and that could be good news for Bitcoin
item.description: “Sell in May and go away” is the idea that stocks reliably underperform between May and October, and it describes a market that might no longer exist. Bloomberg Intelligence data shows the S&P 500 ETF...
item.dc:creator: CryptoSlate

item.title: CISA orders feds to patch Windows flaw exploited as zero-day
item.description: The U.S. Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) has ordered federal agencies to secure their Windows systems against a vulnerability exploited in zero-day attacks. [...]...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer
